debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 0 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂θ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
rcases eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0 with hP | hP
  · simp [hP, (norm_eq_zero.mp hP)]
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  field_simp
  rw [HasFDerivAt.rotproj_outer pbar P pc.w |>.fderiv]
  simp

rcases eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0 with h | h
  · sorry
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
  field_simp [h]
  sorry

by_cases hP : ‖P‖ = 0
  · rw [norm_eq_zero] at hP; simp [hP, map_zero, inner_zero_left]
  · simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit, div_eq_inv_mul]
    rw [fderiv_const_mul _ (by fun_prop), ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    field_simp [hP]
    rw [fderiv_inner (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    simp

rcases eq_or_ne ‖P‖ 0 with h | h
  · simp [h, norm_eq_zero.mp h]
  · simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
    field_simp [h]
    rw [(pbar.hasFDerivAt_rotM₂ P).inner (hasFDerivAt_const pc.w pbar.outerParams) |>.fderiv]
    simp [Pose.rotM₂', EuclideanSpace.single, EuclideanSpace.basisFun]

by_cases hP : ‖P‖ = 0
  · simp [hP, Pose.rotM₂θ_zero P hP]
  · have hPpos : 0 < ‖P‖ := norm_pos_iff.mpr (norm_ne_zero_iff.mp hP)
    simp [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, (rotation_partials_exist_outer hPpos).differentiableAt (le_refl 2) |>.fderiv, rotproj_outer_unit, hP]
    field_simp
    rw [Pose.rotM₂θ_fderiv P pbar]
